bugs.title: chiseledTest task runtime success not verified
bugs.expected: ./gradlew chiseledTest runs successfully and invokes the test task across all 5 subprojects
bugs.suggested_fix: Run ./gradlew chiseledTest in a real Gradle environment. Without a Gradle daemon execution in this agent context, this criterion cannot be confirmed.

bugs.title: Test source set is force-realized but not explicitly redirected to Stonecutter chiseled output
bugs.expected: build.gradle.kts registers the src/test source set with Stonecutter so that per-version build/chiseledSrc/test directories are created
bugs.suggested_fix: Stonecutter's configureSources() iterates the SourceSetContainer automatically. The force-realization fix should be sufficient, but the verifier cannot confirm without a real Gradle run. If chiseledSrc/test still isn't produced, an explicit srcDirs redirect may be needed.
